description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the jangrewe/gitlab-ci-android Docker image. Define two stages: build and test. In the build stage add a build job that runs the before_script commands `export GRADLE_USER_HOME=$(pwd)/.gradle`, `chmod +x ./gradlew`, `apt-get --quiet update --yes`, and `apt-get --quiet install --yes wget`, then executes `./gradlew assembleDebug` and publishes `app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk` as an artifact. Cache the `.gradle/` directory using the key `${CI_PROJECT_ID}`. In the test stage add a unitTests job that runs `./gradlew test`.
